title: What's in Store for Array Technologies (ARRY) in Q3 2023 Earnings
text: Analysts were expecting Array's revenue to decline 33.5% year on year to $232.9 million, representing further deceleration from 32% decrease recorded in same quarter previous year. Increasing average selling price of Array's products was likely to have favorably contributed to third-quarter revenues. However, America's high-interest rate environment led to surge in financing costs for panel installations, and demand scenario in U.S. market had been bleak, which might have affected Array Technologies' megawatt shipments and revenues in third quarter. Looking at Array's peers in renewable energy segment: American Superconductor delivered year-over-year revenue growth of 60.2%, beating analysts' expectations by 6.1%. Generac reported revenues up 9.6%, topping estimates by 1%. In last reported quarter, company delivered earnings surprise of 147.37%, and also delivered trailing four-quarter average earnings surprise of 235.45%.
